expected_behavior: Input follows one versioned schema containing trusted subject, tenant/namespace/workspace, resource, action, classification, mission authority, risk, data scope, connector/tool capability, and environment fields.
given: A protected data, tool, action, connector, model, policy-admin, or memory operation is requested.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Schema file, valid/invalid fixtures, input digest and source-of-attribute map.
then: Input follows one versioned schema containing trusted subject, tenant/namespace/workspace, resource, action, classification, mission authority, risk, data scope, connector/tool capability, and environment fields.
verification_method: Contract tests and golden inputs for every operation family.
when: The product constructs an OPA input document.
